top.name: Replicate
top.rules_text: Copy the last spell you cast this turn. Cast copy immediately with new targets. Costs 0.

channel.name: Replicate (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Copy retains +damage buffs from this turn

bottom.name: Spell Surge
bottom.rules_text: Deal 4 damage per spell cast this turn (including this). Minimum 2.

channel.name: Spell Surge (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Each hit also pushes target 1 tile
